statement.p: Parnell and Aleric worked together to paint a room, and it took them 3 hours to complete the job. If they work alone, it would take Aleric 8 more hours than Parnell to complete the job. Answer the following questions:
If Parnell paints the room alone, it would take him hours to complete the job.
If Aleric paints the room alone, it would take him hours to complete the job.

solution.p: Lets understand how to use fractions to model work problems. Assume it takes a person 5 hours to complete a job. If we treat the whole job as one whole, each hour, this person would complete \frac{1}{5} of the job.
Similarly, if it takes a person x hours to complete a job, each hour, this person would complete \frac{1}{x} of the job.
Now we are ready to model this situation with math.
Assume that, if Parnell paints the room alone, it would take him x hours to complete the job. Each hour, Parnell does \frac{1}{x} of the whole job.

Its given that, if they work alone, it would take Aleric 8 more hours to complete the job. So it would take Aleric x+8 hours to complete the job. Each hour, Aleric does \frac{1}{x+8} of the whole job.
Its given that, if they work together, it took them 3 hours to complete the job. Each hour, they can complete \frac{1}{3} of the whole job.
Now we can write an equation and solve it:

p.m: \displaystyle{\begin{aligned} \amp \frac{1}{x}+\frac{1}{x+8} = \frac{1}{3} \\ \amp \frac{1}{x} \cdot {3x\mathopen{}\left(x+8\right)} +\frac{1}{x+8} \cdot {3x\mathopen{}\left(x+8\right)} = \frac{1}{3} \cdot {3x\mathopen{}\left(x+8\right)} \\ \amp 3(x+8) + 3x = x(x+8) \\ \amp 3x+24 +3x = x^{2}+8x \\ \amp 6x+24 = x^{2}+8x \\ \amp 0= x^{2}+8x -6x -24 \\ \amp 0= x^{2}+2x -24 \\ \amp 0= (x-4)(x + 6) \\ \amp x-4=0 \:\: or\:\: x + 6=0 \\ \amp x=4 \:\: or\:\: x=-6 \end{aligned} }

solution.p: In the second step, to get rid of all fractions, we multiplied each term with the common denominator {3x\mathopen{}\left(x+8\right)}.
In this situation, x=-6 is not a valid solution, since hours cannot be negative. x=4 is the only solution. It would take Parnell {4} hours to complete the job.
Since, if they work alone, it would take Aleric 8 more hours to complete the job, it would take Aleric {4}+8={12} hours to complete the job.
